title: 'Trump getting bored with Iran, wants to move on': Report
content: President Trump is publicly portraying the US military involvement in Iran as over, despite ongoing troop deployments and high tensions. This disconnect from battlefield reality has unsettled aides and allies, with some describing his messaging as detached and driven by a desire to declare victory and move on.

title: Synergy, Team India spirit: What was discussed in key PM Modi-CMs meet amid Iran war
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi held a virtual meeting with Chief Ministers. The focus was on the Middle East conflict's impact on fuel supply, inflation, and logistics. Discussions aimed to ensure coordinated action between the Centre and states. Preparedness for potential disruptions and maintaining stability in essential sectors were key. Contingency planning for fuel availability and price pressures was also reviewed.

title: ‘Josh Hazlewood returns but…’: RCB coach gives key fitness update before SRH clash
content: RCB coach Andy Flower views the IPL's Impact Player rule as a positive tactical innovation, enhancing strategic decisions despite concerns about diluting team selection challenges.  He also confirmed Josh Hazlewood's arrival but unavailability for the opener, expressing confidence in other Indian pacers like Mangesh, Abhinandan, and Rasik to fill the void.

title: Avalanche at Zoji La pass: 7 killed, 5 injured in Ladakh; Srinagar-Leh highway blocked
content: Tragedy struck Zoji La in Ladakh on Friday as an avalanche claimed at least seven lives and left several injured. The devastating snowslide also caused a significant disruption, blocking the vital Srinagar-Leh highway and halting traffic. Immediate rescue and relief operations are in full swing, with authorities expressing deep sorrow and offering condolences to affected families.

title: Hackers who brought down Stryker hacked Kash Patel’s email: Read message to FBI Director
content: Iranian hackers, Handala Hack Team, claim to have breached FBI Director Kash Patel's personal email, releasing private photos and documents. A Justice Department official confirmed the breach, with published material appearing authentic. The group, identifying as pro-Palestinian vigilantes, also claimed responsibility for a recent cyberattack on medical device maker Stryker.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' BO day 9: Ranveer Singh starrer inches closer to netting Rs. 700 crore
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage epic, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', shows no signs of slowing down as it enters its high-stakes second weekend. Starring Ranveer Singh as the covert spy Hamza, the film has officially joined the elite Rs. 1,000 crore global club in just nine days, matching the record-shattering pace of Allu Arjun starrer 'Pushpa 2.' The sequel is now poised to surpass the Rs. 894.49 crore lifetime record set by the original 2025 released 'Dhurandhar.'

title: 'Rohit can’t be an Impact Player': Ex-India batter sends strong message to Hardik
content: Mohammad Kaif urges Mumbai Indians to fully utilize Rohit Sharma on the field, not just as an Impact Player. He believes Rohit's leadership and on-field presence are crucial, especially in high-pressure situations, and would benefit both the team and his own batting. Kaif emphasized that a fitter Rohit should be involved in all game phases.

title: Top executives of two biggest US companies are leaving and they say the reason is AI
content: Two prominent CEOs, from Coca-Cola and Walmart, have cited the rise of AI as a factor in their decisions to step down. Both leaders indicated that the evolving business landscape, driven by AI, necessitates new leadership for future growth phases. Their departures highlight a significant technological shift impacting executive decision-making at major corporations.

title: 'Major disaster': Speeding trailer rams car in Bengaluru, man burnt alive in blaze
content: A tragic accident near Kurubarahalli saw a speeding trailer truck, allegedly on a restricted route, collide with a parked MUV, igniting a devastating blaze. The inferno claimed the life of 23-year-old Ambadas, a cab driver, trapped inside his vehicle.

title: UK rejects China's clean energy project that US lawmakers had warned against
content: The UK government has reportedly blocked a $2 billion wind turbine factory proposal by Chinese firm Mingyang, citing national security and supply chain resilience concerns. This decision, influenced by US pressure, highlights growing global mistrust and the challenges for Chinese investment in Western infrastructure, despite green energy ambitions.

title: Priyadarshan says Asrani was better than Amitabh in Abhimaan
content: Veteran actor Asrani's final performances are in Priyadarshan's upcoming films, 'Bhooth Bangla' and 'Haiwaan,' both also featuring Akshay Kumar. Priyadarshan lauded Asrani's versatility, while Kumar shared a poignant piece of advice from the late actor regarding film production. 'Bhooth Bangla' is highly anticipated for its release.

title: Fact check: Is LEGO launching Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo sets?
content: LEGO is rumored to join the growing excitement around the FIFA World Cup 2026. The popular toy brand is speculated to introduce new football-themed sets. Two of them are already making waves on social media. These include a detailed model of the official World Cup 2026 ball. It features a mini stadium hidden inside. Another set showcases the iconic FIFA World Cup trophy in LEGO form. Both sets have caught the attention of football fans and collectors.

title: Fact Check: Was Clavicular Arrested for Viral Alligator Shooting Video
content: Kick streamer Braden “Clavicular” Peters went viral after a clip showed him allegedly shooting an alligator in Florida’s Everglades. The video sparked outrage and rumors of his arrest. However, no official confirmation links any arrest to the incident. Authorities are investigating, while reports suggest any detention may be unrelated, leaving key details unclear.

title: NFL Trade rumor: Chargers linked to $90 m Dolphins star to boost Justin Herbert offense
content: Tyreek Hill trade talk picked up again as the Los Angeles Chargers are reportedly targeting Miami Dolphins playmaker Tyreek Hill, a $90M talent, to address their offensive struggles. A viral post suggested that Hill could join the Chargers or Chiefs after the NFL Draft. Money also plays a role. Hill may not command the full value after the injury. That makes this a smart gamble for Los Angeles. If the Chargers pull this off after the draft, it solves their biggest issue. It adds speed, forces defences to back off, and finally gives Herbert the weapon he has been missing.

title: MLB Rumors: Detroit Tigers' $140 m call as Kevin McGonigle rises
content: Detroit's decision to place Kevin McGonigle on the Opening Day roster has created a roster crunch, pushing Javier Báez into an uncertain role.  With his substantial contract, trade talks are intensifying. A potential deal with Miami could see Báez move for prospects, offering Detroit payroll relief and a clearer path for younger talent.

title: Magic Johnson opens up on living with HIV years after diagnosis
content: Magic Johnson recently revisited his journey living with HIV during a conference in Atlanta, offering a candid reflection shaped by decades of experience. From his shocking 1991 retirement to becoming a global advocate, Johnson turned fear into purpose. Supported by his wife Cookie and guided by medical progress, he continues to inspire through honesty, education, and resilience, proving his impact extends far beyond basketball.

title: 'IPL se better offer mila aur woh chale gaye': Ex-Pakistan star questions PSL's decline
content: Former Pakistan batter Ahmed Shehzad has sharply criticized the Pakistan Super League (PSL), ranking it significantly below the Indian Premier League (IPL). He highlighted how many overseas players commit to the PSL but later opt for the IPL due to better offers, impacting Pakistan's premier T20 competition and its national team's development.

title: China masses over 200 J-6 'drones' near Taiwan as US-Iran war escalates
content: China has deployed converted J-6 fighter jets as attack drones at air bases near the Taiwan Strait, a move analysts view as a significant shift in its warfighting posture. These repurposed aircraft are intended for saturation attacks, aiming to overwhelm air defenses through sheer numbers and cost asymmetry.

title: Quote of the day by Agatha Christie: “As life goes on it becomes tiring to keep up...”
content: Agatha Christie, the celebrated 'Queen of Crime', explored human nature deeply. Her autobiography reveals profound insights into identity. A quote from her work suggests that as life unfolds, people tire of maintaining invented characters. They eventually return to their true selves, finding liberation in authenticity. This journey of self-discovery is a key theme.

title: Cold War 2.0 trigger? US bristles as Russian tanker nears oil-starved Cuba
content: A Russian tanker carrying oil is heading towards Cuba, intensifying a geopolitical standoff with the US. This move challenges America's de facto oil blockade on the island, which is facing an energy crisis. The situation echoes the Cuban Missile Crisis, highlighting Cuba's enduring strategic importance and testing US resolve in its hemisphere.

title: Inside Bappi Lahiri’s Mumbai home: Gold chair, 1000 Ganesh idols, rare photo
content: Bappi Lahiri's 1,050 sq ft Mumbai home pulses with his legacy: music, memories, gold chair, 1,000 Ganesh idols, Kishore Kumar's last photo. Grandson reveals cozy rooms, award walls, soundproof studio for Disco Dancer, heartfelt meals, faith nooks, and verandah vibes—beyond real estate, a disco era shrine.

title: No retakes, no filters: Why our souls crave theatre's raw power
content: Delhi's cultural hub buzzes with anticipation as theatre-goers gather for live performances, an ancient art form that continues to reflect society. From classical Sanskrit drama to modern plays and vibrant folk traditions, theatre offers a raw, unfiltered experience, demanding full presence from artists and audiences alike.

title: Nick Cassidy seals historic pole for Citroen at Madrid E-Prix
content: Citroen Racing driver Nick Cassidy secured his maiden pole with the new Formula E team, but his race at the Madrid E-Prix did not go to plan after contact with Norman Nato. The Kiwi driver later reflected on the Round 6 race, describing it as enjoyable despite the disappointing result.

title: 'On our toes over deficit': Sitharaman amid Middle East crisis, dismisses lockdown rumours
content: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman assured that India will maintain fiscal prudence while shielding citizens from rising global crude oil prices. She highlighted India's stable fuel prices compared to other nations, dismissing lockdown rumors as baseless and aimed at creating fear. The government has reduced excise duty on petrol and diesel to protect consumers.

title: ‘Punjab Kings will lift the cup’: PBKS batter’s bold IPL 2026 prediction
content: Shashank Singh is confident Punjab Kings will win the IPL trophy this season after their narrow 2025 final loss. He emphasizes team belief and a match-by-match approach, focusing on preparation over past success. Singh also highlights the importance of embracing his lower-middle order role and prioritizing team impact over individual milestones.

title: 'Treated as if she were a table or chair': A child’s case that tests conscience of institutions
content: The Supreme Court of India has intervened in a Gurugram child sexual assault case, exposing systemic failures by police and the Child Welfare Committee. The Court's strong criticism highlights investigative lapses and institutional insensitivity, prompting the formation of a Special Investigation Team to restore faith in the justice system.

title: Abhishek, Sooryavanshi changing T20 game; GT batter has a different plan
content: Sai Sudharsan prioritizes batting versatility over solely chasing high strike rates for IPL 2026, aiming to adapt to various pitch conditions. He believes in playing longer innings to secure team victories. Sudharsan also expressed strong trust in Gujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill's leadership and his ability to understand and support players.

title: Post Ajit Pawar crash, DGCA issues new rules for VVIP non scheduled flights
content: Following a fatal small plane crash, the DGCA has issued new guidelines empowering pilots flying VVIPs to refuse unsafe flights. These rules aim to prevent undue pressure on flight crews and ensure safety by mandating professional judgment, proper aircraft maintenance, and pre-flight checks for all dignitaries' air travel.

title: ‘We saw tanks on the road’: How playing chess amid regional conflict feels
content: The 2026 Candidates chess tournament in Cyprus faces pre-event anxieties due to Middle East tensions, leading to a player withdrawal and concerns over logistics. This echoes a past instance in 1978 Tehran, where Indian players competed amidst a crumbling monarchy and civil unrest, largely shielded by isolation from news and the tournament's remote location.

title: Varun Dhawan says daughter diagnosed with DDH, wants to write a book
content: Actor Varun Dhawan revealed his daughter was diagnosed with DDH, a condition affecting hip development. She recently underwent a procedure and was in a spica cast for 2.5 months. Dhawan shared this to raise awareness about the treatable condition in India, urging parents to monitor their children's movements. Read on to know more in detail.

title: S-400 system, Dhanush guns: Centre clears Rs 2.3 lakh crore deal in major defence boost
content: India's Defence Acquisition Council has greenlit defense deals worth approximately Rs 2.38 lakh crore to bolster military capabilities.  Key acquisitions include advanced air defense systems for the Army, medium transport aircraft and the S-400 missile system for the Air Force, and heavy-duty air cushion vehicles for the Coast Guard, significantly enhancing national security.

title: Stabbed thrice, 54-year-old Punjab woman fights off intruder posing as delivery agent
content: Sushma Sharma, a 54-year-old resident of Mohali, showcased unparalleled bravery when an armed intruder masquerading as a delivery man invaded her home. Despite enduring three stab wounds and facing a weapon mimicking a firearm, she fought fiercely to safeguard her grandson.

title: Middle East crisis: Govt puts export duties on diesel, turbine oil; eyes Rs 1,500 cr collection
content: The government has imposed export duties on diesel and turbine fuel to boost domestic availability and energy security, estimating Rs 1,500 crore in revenue. Simultaneously, special excise duties on petrol and diesel were reduced to shield consumers, keeping retail prices stable amid global oil supply concerns.

title: Saba Azad hospitalised after being diagnosed with parasite Cyclospora cayetanensis
content: Actor Saba Azad has been hospitalized after contracting the parasite Cyclospora cayetanensis, describing the experience as the "worst 14 days" of her life. She lost significant weight and strength due to the illness. Throughout her ordeal, actor Hrithik Roshan has been a constant source of support, helping to lift her spirits.

title: Wetzel: Despite scandals, Rick Pitino might be the best men's college hoops coach ever
content: Less than 10 years ago, Pitino's career seemed over. But after multiple scandals, he's back doing what he always does, winning in the NCAA tournament.

title: Sources: NBA presents 3 anti-tanking proposals
content: The NBA presented three comprehensive anti-tanking concepts to its board of governors Wednesday as part of this week's meetings in New York, with modifications expected to each before a formal vote in May, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

title: Gervin irked QB Williams filed 'Iceman' trademark
content: Former NBA star George Gervin said he was "caught off guard" when he learned Bears quarterback Caleb Williams had attempted to trademark "Iceman," a nickname Gervin has used since his playing days.

title: Coaches react to Close's comments on grind
content: Cori Close isn't sure how much longer she will be coaching. The responsibilities of coaches have changed a lot in her 33 years in the game, especially in the past few years.

title: Bills bring back Hamlin on one-year contract
content: The Bills have re-signed safety Damar Hamlin to a one-year contract after his 2025 season was cut short by injury.

title: Arizona rolls, hands Calipari worst tourney loss
content: Arizona finally got over the Sweet 16 hurdle under coach Tommy Lloyd, getting 23 points from Brayden Burries and a dominant offensive effort in a 109-88 win over Arkansas on Thursday night in the NCAA tournament.

title: Phils' Bohm accuses parents of siphoning money
content: Phillies third baseman Alec Bohm has sued his parents for millions of dollars, alleging they moved large amounts of his money into financial accounts they managed for him and then used some of the cash to pay their own expenses.

title: Huskers' Hoiberg shoulders personnel blunder
content: Coach Fred Hoiberg said a late-game blunder that left his team with only four players on the court before a critical three-point play in the final minute of Thursday night's loss to Iowa in the Sweet 16 was his fault.

title: Inter Miami honor Messi with stand in stadium
content: Inter Miami will honor Lionel Messi by naming a part of the club's new Nu Stadium after him, unveiling a section as the Leo Messi Stand.

title: 🏈 NFL draft buzz: Simpson's pro day and more
content: How high could QB Ty Simpson get picked? Is Jeremiyah Love really a possibility for the Titans at No. 4?

title: How every Sweet 16 game was won Thursday -- and each winner's keys to Elite Eight
content: Arizona, Illinois, Iowa and Purdue are moving on. Here's how they advanced -- and how they can do it again.

title: Why NBA insiders are all-in on the Spurs: 'Victor breaks all the rules'
content: San Antonio's title buzz is growing around the league. Plus, new intel on expansion and an East playoff race full of injury questions.

title: NHL playoff watch: Projecting the Red Wings' postseason chances
content: Detroit is running out of time to climb back into a playoff spot. Plus, full postseason bracket projections.

title: 'Nobody has seen the best in Vladdy yet': How a dominant October took Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to a new level
content: Toronto's slugger proved he was a superstar in the playoffs, but it was in his leadership that he really stepped up. Now, the hope is that carries over to 2026 -- and beyond.

title: WNBA's CBA: 10 biggest wins from new agreement
content: The CBA permanently and positively changes the WNBA's landscape. These are the wins, biggest strides and areas of compromise.

title: A former NFL GM's must-draft board for 2026: Tannenbaum pounds the table for 14 prospects
content: From Dillon Thieneman on Day 1 to Jaffer Murphy late on Day 3, Mike Tannenbaum picks the draft prospects he'd want to target across all seven rounds.

title: The USMNT's weakness at World Cups has been a lack of depth. Has that finally changed?
content: World Cup-winning teams need more than their starting 11, but the U.S. men's national team never had enough good bench options. Maybe that has finally changed?

title: Reranked: Who is the MVP for each of the top Premier League clubs?
content: Based on a simple combination of ability and tactical importance, we've reranked the best players in order at the Big Six Premier League clubs.

title: How Hodgson's 44-year coaching gap at one club compares to others in soccer, NFL, NBA
content: Roy Hodgson is returning to Bristol City as their interim manager, 44 years after they hired him the first time.

title: Lehigh Valley IronPigs poke fun at Zack Wheeler's rib removal in rehab promo
content: The Philadelphia Phillies' ace had a rib removed as part of a surgery to remove a blood clot -- and kept it in his closet.

title: 'The KING ... Shot by ME': Caitlin Clark photographs LeBron James at Lakers-Pacers
content: The Fever star was behind the lens as a credentialed photographer at Wednesday's Lakers-Pacers matchup.

title: Women's college hoops: UConn consolidates status as odds-on title favorite
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: Ted Ginn Jr., AJ McCarron and Chris Redman begin pro coaching careers in familiar spots
content: The UFL comes out swinging in Columbus, Louisville and Birmingham with familiar college stars as coaches.

title: An early look at 2027 NFL free agency: Which playmakers could be available next March?
content: Which top players might be available in next year's NFL free agency? We picked out 49 stars to keep an eye on.

title: Ranking all 32 free agency classes: Which teams most improved their rosters?
content: How did every team fare in March, taking into account free agent signings, trades, extensions and departures?

title: Spiky and unforgettable, Wales went 'full gas' but paid the price
content: Wales scrapped for every inch of the pitch against Bosnia and Herzegovina, but in the end, it wasn't enough to save their World Cup dream.

title: World Cup playoff preview, predictions: Who will book the final six spots?
content: The final six spots -- four from Europe and two from the intercontinental playoff -- will be clinched this week.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Could Foden leave Man City this summer?
content: Phil Foden could reportedly leave Manchester City in the hunt for more first-team football. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: Assembly Elections highlights: Modi government may hike fuel prices after Assembly polls, says Abhishek Banerjee
content: The TMC general secretary dared PM Modi and his Ministers to make a promise at their election meetings that there would be no hike in the prices of LPG, petrol, and diesel over the next five years.

title: Jaishankar raises concerns about food, fuel, fertilizer shortages at G-7 meet
content: External Affairs Minister stresses importance of resilient trade corridors, such as the IMEC, especially amidst uncertainties of West Asian conflict; calls for freedom of navigation to ensure global economic security

title: Mamata Banerjee hits out at ECI for not making first supplementary list of SIR public
content: Calling the non-availability of the list a "murder of democracy", CM Mamata Banerjee warned that "people will soon seek answers to such arbitrary exercise of power".

title: TG Transco urges Irrigation department to clear dues of ₹33,650 crore
content: The dues mostly pertain to period April 1, 2021 to February 28, this year on account of energy, O&M charges, capital works

title: No need to panic on fertilizer stocks: Centre
content: Union Minister J. P. Nadda said he has spoken to State Agriculture Ministers and informed them about availability of fertilizers

title: 7 killed as avalanche hits Srinagar-Leh National Highway
content: Officials said the avalanche hit the Srinagar-Leh national highway near Zero Point at the Zojila Pass in the afternoon, when a train of passenger vehicles was negotiating the snow-laden road

title: ED files chargesheet against ex-RCOM executive Punit Garg in ₹40,000 crore bank loan fraud case
content: Chargesheet also names Vaishali Jairam Mane as an accused, for her alleged involvement in the purchase of a luxury Manhattan apartment from the proceeds of the crime

title: Defence Acquisition Council approves proposals worth ₹2.38 lakh crore
content: Procurement of various systems seeks to enhance combat, surveillance and mobility capabilities across armed forces

title: Kerala govt expands LPG war room into round-the-clock statewide monitoring system
content: The initiative aims to ensure uninterrupted availability, equitable distribution and timely delivery of cooking gas across the State

title: J&K, Ladakh all set for upscaled Kumbh Melas this year
content: Swami Kalikananda Saraswati, who is spearheading the conduct of the festival, said the aim of holding the Kumbh Mela, which used to take place till 1941 in Kashmir, ‘is to convey that God is one irrespective of names we ascribe’

title: Satheesan hits back at CM, accuses CPI(M) of majority, minority appeasement
content: Says Pinarayi Vijayan first welcomed Jamaat-e-Islami and later claimed that he had no connection with the organisation

title: The Hindu World of Women (WoW) Awards 2026: Full list of winners
content: The WoW awards recognises exceptional women across business, science, arts, culture, education, sports and beyond.

title: Opposition’s notice seeking removal of Chief Election Commissioner still unacknowledged: Derek O’Brien
content: Senior Trinamool Congress leader alleges ‘tacit understanding’ between Centre and Election Commission on the matter

title: SSUS V-C cancels files approved by former V-C
content: The Save University Campaign Committee alleged that around 40 files were cleared by former Vice-Chancellor Dr. Geethakumary after notification removing her from the post was issued

title: Meloni’s referendum gamble backfires
content: The judicial reforms promoted by Italian Prime Minister stand rejected in the referendum with 54% of the public voting “No”. The Opposition has used the opportunity to denounce the legitimacy of Meloni’s government.

title: Karnataka bypolls: Congress rebel candidate retires from contest in Davangere South
content: Rebel candidate Sadiq Pahilwan announced that he would extend full support to Congress candidate Samarth Mallikarjun, son of Minister S.S. Mallikarjun

title: Telangana moots slew of measures to speed up PNG network expansion
content: Deemed approvals, permission to operate 24/7 and waiver of charges besides setting of committees form part a GO  issued after the Centre urged States to help speed transistion from LPG to PNG

title: KTDC offers summer packages for families
content: The packages are priced between Rs.4, 555 and Rs.39,999 inclusive of room rent, breakfast and tax for two nights/three days’ stay

title: High Court says signs, gestures are oral evidence, upholds conviction of man for raping disabled woman
content: Court observes that the trial court had adopted demonstrative methods, including the use of a plastic doll, to remove any possibility of misunderstanding in the survivor’s testimony

title: Lorry crashes into car, sets off blaze at Kurubarahalli in Bengaluru; one dead
content: The stretch has a steep downward slope. The driver lost control of the vehicle on the slope due to the heavy load

title: Critical shortage of human resources force Ob-gyn specialists to play it safe
content: They have decided to refrain from conducting deliveries in public hospitals that lack adequate human resources, facilities and infrastructure

title: Markapuram bus fire: DNA matching of all victims completed, says SP
content: Arrangements have been made to shift the bodies of the victims to their native places, says Harshavardhan Raju

title: Minister Narayana aims to develop Nellore as ‘green city’
content: ₹850 crore allocated to Nellore Municipal Corporation to develop the city on the lines of Chandigarh and Singapore

title: Emergency landing of drone creates panic in tribal hamlet at G. Madugula in ASR district
content: The drone operated by Redwing was being tested as part of an initiative to deliver medicines to remote Agency areas. It had taken off from Paderu and was en route to G. Madugula when it reportedly went out of control mid-flight, says sources

title: No plans for a lockdown in the country: Nirmala Sitharaman
content: Ms. Sitharaman said neighbouring countries such as Pakistan and Bangladesh have announced lockdowns, restricting movements and public events. “We are not doing this. But rumours are being spread by some leaders that there will be a lockdown. There is no plan for a lockdown in India”

title: Karnataka sets up State-level panel to strengthen palliative care services
content: The decision, notified in a Government Order dated March 23, follows a proposal from the Health Department highlighting the need for structured technical guidance and coordinated efforts to expand palliative care.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Wildlife incursion, a vote-catcher issue in many constituencies
content: Wildlife attacks have claimed many lives and ruined farmers financially. So affected are the farmers that they have fielded a candidate in Kozhikode against the State Forest Minister. They are seeking the views of candidates across all constituencies regarding conflict mitigation plans. In at least one-fourth of the constituencies in the State, it is the main topic of electioneering

title: Kattumannarkoil (SC): An agrarian constituency where even basic demands of farmers remain unfulfilled
content: Given the caste matrix of the constituency, where there are 2.24 lakh voters with a strong mix of Dalits and Vanniyars, it is the consolidation of these major groups that holds the key. The constituency also has a good concentration of Muslims and has traditionally favoured candidates of the DMK, the Congress and the VCK

title: Karnataka High Court quashes FIR against Sri Ravi Shankar on land encroachment allegations
content: There is not even an iota of allegation against the petitioner for land grabbing or encroachment, observes Justice M. Nagaprasanna

title: Overspeeding, lack of lane discipline of driver led to Markapuram bus accident, say officials
content: Speed limits must be followed, considering road curvature, visibility, and traffic conditions, says Fire Services in-charge Director General P Venkata Ramana

title: Operating licences also included in e-auction, alleges wine merchants’ federation
content: The e-auction of 579 licences which was expected to fetch the cash-starved government a minimum of ₹600 crore has been currently stayed by the Karnataka High Court.

title: Naidu and Pawan welcome Centre’s decision to cut excise duty on petrol, diesel
content: It will help shield citizens from the impact of global fuel price volatility, they say, while highlighting the NDA government’s continued focus on balancing economic challenges with public welfare

title: Accused shot at and injured during scene reconstruction of kidnap of 5-year-old in Anantapur
content: The accused reportedly turned aggressive and assaulted police personnel with a broken beer bottle, prompting police to fire in the air and then shoot him in the knee

title: Anti-Drone Systems, AI-Powered CCTV: Noida Airport's Multi-Layered Defence
content: A total of 1,047 Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) personnel will be deployed at the facility.

title: Pilots Have Final Say: VVIP Flight Rules Tightened After Ajit Pawar Crash
content: The move comes amid rising concerns over safety lapses in VIP and election flying, especially after the death of Maharashtra deputy chief minister Ajit Pawar and four others in a plane crash this January.

title: Pics: Inside Noida International Airport Ahead Of Inauguration By PM Modi
content: Uttar Pradesh's much-awaited Noida International Airport is set for its formal launch, with Prime Minister Narendra Modi scheduled to inaugurate the project on March 28.

title: Congress Rebels To Contest Against Allies DMK, VCK In 6 Puducherry Seats
content: VCK chief Thirumavalvan blamed the Congress for the confusion between the allies and announced that his party will contest independently in two constituencies.

title: Student At Chennai's Anna University Alleges Sexual Harassment By Professor
content: The student has alleged the professor frequently sent her obscene messages, and called her late at night to hold inappropriate conversations.

title: DK Shivakumar's Update On Karnataka MLAs' Demand For IPL Tickets
content: The statement came a day after members of the Karnataka Legislative Assembly, across party lines, raised the issue of ticket and seating arrangements for them during the matches.

title: Iran War LIVE: Israel Warns Attacks On Iran 'Will Escalate And Expand'
content: The war in the Middle East began when the US and Israel conducted strikes on Iran, killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and other senior leaders.

title: "Insanity": US Senator Blames Trump As Iran Imposes $2 Million Fee In Hormuz
content: "Here's the problem. The strait was open before the war began, we are now seeking to solve a problem that we created. This is insanity!" he said.

title: Centre Forms Ministerial Group To Address Middle East Conflict Impact
content: The "arrangement" comes in view of the issues arising due to the impact of the West Asia conflict, the sources said.

title: "Alarmingly Low": Pentagon Scrambles After US Fires 850 Tomahawks At Iran
content: It can take up to 2 years to build a Tomahawk, costing $3.6 million a piece, according to the report. Moreover, last year's budget had included only 57 of them.

title: Maharashtra's Fishing Industry Hits Rough Seas As Rising Diesel Costs Anchor Boats
content: The situation has sparked significant resentment among local communities, who allege a disparity in how regional grievances are addressed.

title: Adani Group Honoured With Net Zero Leadership At India Climate Week 2026
content: New Delhi, March 27 (IANS) The Adani Group on Friday said it has been recognised with the Net Zero Leadership honour at the 'India Climate Samman' during the 'India Climate Week 2026' here.

title: From Iran To Lebanon: How Middle East War Is Uprooting Millions
content: More than 51,500 Iranians have crossed into Turkiye between 28 February and 26 March, according to the UN Refugee Agency.

title: Noida International Airport Likely To Connect These 10 Destinations
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will inaugurate Phase 1 of the Noida International Airport on March 28. Flight operations are expected to begin a few weeks after the formal launch.

title: Policewoman Poisoned Cop Father's Milkshake. 3 Years Later, She Is Busted
content: On the morning in question, Arya mixed the poison into the milkshake and gave it to her father as he was preparing to go on duty.

title: Bihar Man Slits Throat Of Minor Nephews, Niece With Cutter, Attempts Suicide
content: The victims have been identified as Anish Kumar, 10, Ayush Kumar, 7, and Anushka Kumari, 5, all children of Guddu Pal.

title: Slovak, Russian Nationals Detained For Entering Mizoram Without Travel Permit
